headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on PPL, Raises Price Target to $41
summary: Barclays  analyst Theresa Chen   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $40 to $41.

headline: PPL Corporation’s Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: PPL Corporation is all set to report its first-quarter results shortly, and analysts are projecting its earnings to rise in a single-digit.
